{{Quote|By meditating and channeling the Force through the cube, it is possible to manipulate the inanimate objects inside, merging them to create something entirely new.|[[Chu-Gon Dar]]|<ref name="Sony">{{SonyCite|url=en_US/players/content.vm?id=66863&resource=features|text=Chu-Gon Dar Cube Items}}</ref>}}
The '''Chu-Gon Dar cube''' was a very special item, capable of transmogrification. It was made by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Chu-Gon Dar]] thousands of years before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. This item was only compatible with objects with a special Force aura. These objects, after several volcanic eruptions, rose from the old [[Jedi enclave (Mustafar)/Legends|Jedi Temples]], and lay scattered on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]].

==Behind the scenes==
The Chu-Gon Dar cube was an item in [[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan|''Trials of Obi-Wan'']], the third expansion for [[Sony]] Online Entertainment's [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|MMORPG]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]]. It was a reward for a short quest for the NPC [[Ithes Olok]].

Many "glowing" items could be looted from killed enemies all over Mustafar. Putting various combinations of these items into the cube produced new items such as Mustafarian furniture, buffs, weapons, armor and other useful items.

An entry in Sony Online Entertainment's Knowledge Base that was published shortly before the release of ''Trials of Obi-Wan'' to inform players about the new features called these items "The Cubes of Jen'ha Tar".
